title: begonia cognata
intro: Begonia cognata, also known as the River Lights Begonia, is a species of flowering plant native to Australia and New Guinea, characterized by its unique, golden-green leaves with a silvery underside. The medicinal properties of Begonia cognata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Begonia cognata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with some cultures also using its leaves in traditional medicine and cooking.
